raw_consumer_statement: WE HAD TRIED RESOLVE THIS ON THE PHONE BUT THEY WOULD NOT TALK TO US. THE ACCOUNT HOLDER WAS MY FATHER BUT HE PASSED AWAY ON XX/XX/year>. SINCE THEN WE HAVE PAID THE LAST BILL IN THE AMOUNT OF XXXX WITH A LETTER AND COPY OF DEATH CERTIFICATE. THERE ARE FRAUDULENT CHARGES FROM XXXX XXXX AND THEY REFUSE TO REMOVE THEM.
